rationale.R1.7: Audited every load-bearing citation; flags missing key works with bibliographic precision.
rationale.RX.1: Flags uncertainty for one clearly out-of-reach claim (Kowalski et al., 2019), but does not mark confidence and missing evidence for all recommendations.
rationale.RX.3: Output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original (unverified reference Liu & Tang, 2024).
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is not annotated with source and reason.
